sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 7. C 33.00 - Exposures to General governments (GOV)
sections.description: Details regarding the reporting of exposures to general governments.

sections.heading: 7.1. General remarks
sections.description: General information regarding the template C 33.00.

sections.heading: 7.2. Scope of the template on exposures to “General governments”
sections.description: Scope and coverage of the GOV template.

sections.heading: 7.3. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Instructions for reporting specific positions in the template.

sections.heading: BREAKDOWN OF EXPOSURES BY REGULATORY APPROACH
sections.description: Instructions for breaking down exposures based on regulatory approaches.

sections.heading: BREAKDOWN OF EXPOSURES BY RESIDUAL MATURITY
sections.description: Instructions for breaking down exposures based on residual maturity.

C 33.00.name: C 33.00 - Exposures to General governments (GOV)
C 33.00.description: Reports on all exposures to general governments, including on-balance sheet, off-balance sheet, and derivatives.

C 07.00.name: C 07.00 - Exposures to Central governments
C 07.00.description: Reports exposures to central governments as specified in Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.

C 08.01.name: C 08.01 - Exposures to Regional governments or local authorities
C 08.01.description: Reports exposures to regional governments or local authorities as specified in Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.

C 08.02.name: C 08.02 - Exposures to Public sector entities
C 08.02.description: Reports exposures to public sector entities as specified in Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.
